title: cota triumfetti var. discoidea
intro: Cota triumfetti var. discoidea, also known as the "disco daisy", is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cota triumfetti var. discoidea include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
